name: Compagnie Generale des Etablissements Michelin Societe en commandite par actions
summary: Compagnie Generale des Etablissements Michelin Societe en commandite par actions, commonly known as Michelin, is a global tire manufacturer based in Clermont-Ferrand, France. The company produces tires for various types of vehicles, including automobiles, motorcycles, trucks, and aircraft. Michelin also provides services such as road maps, restaurant guides, and digital mobility solutions.
